description:
Extract summary statistics for your 2011 dive season from the Subsurface logbook. Save a screenshot of the yearly statistics to /home/ga/Documents/yearly_stats.png. Record the total number of dives and the maximum depth for the year 2011 in a text file at /home/ga/Documents/2011_summary.txt using the following format:

Dives: [integer]
Max Depth: [value in meters]
